title: Triage output (IC-1 v1)
description: Canonical schema for scripts/triage.py output. Per IC-1 (reference/interface-contracts.md). Mismatches block via V-DEP-08.

category.description: Exactly one of the 9 triage categories.

duplicate_of.description: Issue number this duplicates. Integer ONLY when category=duplicate; null otherwise.

labels_to_add.description: GitHub labels to apply (must exist in tests/fixtures/labels_expected.json).

response_to_user.description: Comment body. For security_critical: <=200 chars AND contains 'email security@' (R-07).

page_human.description: True ONLY when category=security_critical. Triggers SMTP-SSL pager (Task 0.5).

reasoning.description: Free-form explanation of the classification decision (logged, not user-facing).
